rationale: Educ. Code §11.356 governs cost-sharing for students in special-purpose school districts. It has no operative relationship to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraised value limits.
quote: The independent or common school district that is responsible for providing education services to a student who is enrolled in a special-purpose school district established under Section 11.351 shall share the cost of the student's education in the manner provided under Section 30.003
_note: No conflict. The rule addresses special-purpose school district funding mechanics, not homestead exemption levels.
